description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Where a potential instance of Atlas document misalignment is perceived, community members may submit a Request for Review to the Core Facilitator. This Request for Review should be posted in the Sky Forum. The Request for Review need not follow any specific template. Pursuant to [A.0.1.2.1 - Facilitators’ Broad Discretionary Capacity](f18229fe-fbc3-4dc8-ad84-4bca2915f6c4), the Core Facilitator
broad discretion in evaluating and resolving such Requests for Review.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
